problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photodynamic. Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
